name: io.github.dewtech-technologies/obsidian-mcp-secure
description: Secure MCP server for Obsidian with OWASP Top 10 controls and full audit logging.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API Key generated by Obsidian's Local REST API plugin (Settings -> Local REST API -> API Key)

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host of the Local REST API (default: http://127.0.0.1)

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port of the Local REST API (default: 27123)
